narrative.goal: Complete refinement passes on the deployed Next.js in-context learning affordance arc prototype (Promise.all concept) for the Anthropic Education Labs Design Engineer take-home. End-to-end arc is now reachable; refinement upgrades registry-fallback stubs to real beat endpoints, polishes map/workshop visuals, finalizes copy, and ships.
narrative.next: Start KICKOFF Build Step 4 — iterate beat prompts by replacing registry-fallback stubs with real /api endpoints, one beat at a time in order: prediction-options → reveal → reflection-framing → card-meta → ghost-nodes → workshop-opening → workshop-chat. Each beat endpoint uses NDJSON envelope, exp backoff via withBackoff helper, Anthropic tool-use for structured outputs, Sonnet 4.6 for prose. Iterate prompt copy with user in loop.
narrative.state_markdown: - Working dir: /Users/petepetrash/Code/anthropic/education-labs-takehome-main. Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind v4, @anthropic-ai/sdk wired, pnpm package manager (pnpm-lock.yaml dated 2026-05-13). - Build + lint clean (only 2 pre-existing warnings out of scope). - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env.local (user filled in). Dev server typically on :3001. - Foundation complete (Tasks 1-11): Message.id, concept registry (src/lib/concepts.ts with single promise-all-hang entry + fallback content for every beat + TRIGGER_MESSAGE + clientMatchTrigger backstop), NDJSON envelope protocol (src/lib/protocol.ts: EnvelopeEncoder/parseEnvelope, events meta/text/data/done/error/reasoning), PrototypeProvider (src/lib/prototype-store.tsx: arc beats idle→choosing→wrapper-response|predicting→revealing→reflecting→card-ready→map-open→workshop-open, full action surface, localStorage persist at education-labs:prototype-state, resetArc on /new mount), Streamdown integration (markdown rendering with caret+animate, allowedTags for inline arc components , ARC_TAGS+MARKDOWN_COMPONENTS in AssistantBody), side panel slot (480px slide-in, mounted inside chat page not global shell, sidePanel.open/view state). - Classifier + affordance (Tasks 12-19): generic streamCompletion(chatId, request, options) in chat-store exposed for PrototypeProvider to drive arc beats through thinking/streamBuffer/commit pipeline; server-side classifier in /api/chat (Haiku 4.5 tool-use, returns {conceptId, reasoning}); branching on classifier result emits meta {isArc, conceptId, descriptors} and streams affordance prose via Sonnet 4.6 with affordance system prompt instructing inline tag; chat-store threads onMeta via lastCompletion observable state pattern (each meta arrival mints new id so React effects refire); AffordanceButtons component reads PrototypeState (active row → inert pill); /api/wrapper-response endpoint streaming γ.2 wrapper (try/catch outer + AbortController/timeout inside); chooseWrapper fires wrapper stream via stateRef pattern to avoid stale closures; client-side string-match backstop in chat-store runChatCompletion catch synthesizes meta event for trigger text when /api/chat unreachable. - End-to-end stub (Tasks 20-25): chooseLearn appends predict beat (framing + ); recordPrediction cascades through reveal (static commit) + reflect (framing + ); recordReflection appends card beat (framing + ); PredictionOptions/ReflectionInput/ReflectionCard components all read PrototypeState with active→pill state mirror pattern; MapView component (SVG with warm radial halo, central solid node, four dashed ghost nodes hand-positioned, scattered atmospheric outer-ring dots, click central → enterWorkshop, click ghost → reveal hint in banner below); WorkshopView component (stub viz: 3 tracks each 76px label + flex rail + 84px note, two resolved at 0.45 with bg-accent-strong dot, one hanging at 0.55 with animate-pulse bg-accent dot, aggregate "never settles" row below border; opening predict-reveal stub using registry workshopOpening framing/options, back-to-map control). - API endpoints live: /api/chat (classifier+branch), /api/wrapper-response. - Resilience helper: withBackoff in src/lib/retry.ts (3 retries default, exp baseMs 500, retryable=network/5xx/429). - Task tracking: Tasks 1-25 all completed. - React 19 setState-in-effect lint disabled at intentional cross-store sync points (PrototypeProvider arc-fire effect, chat-store + shell.tsx localStorage hydration) with rationale comments. - Memory active: working-mode-design-engineering (user prefs for pair-coding + no-cuts on detailed briefs).
narrative.debt_markdown:
- Registry fallbacks still used for: predict-options framing/options, reveal text, reflection-framing, card-meta framing, ghost-nodes labels/hints, workshop-opening framing/options. Build Step 4 replaces each with real /api endpoint (NDJSON envelope, Anthropic tool-use for structured, Sonnet 4.6 streaming for prose).
- /api/reveal endpoint not yet built — reveal currently appears instantly via static commit; should stream like wrapper-response, system prompt should honor user prediction before correcting and explicitly name near-miss concept via misconceptionTag.
- PRD §9 copy decisions still placeholder: pill labels "Chose:", "Picked:", "Kept:", "Note"; reflection submit button "Add to notes"; card framing line "Got it. Kept this for you:" (provisional from registry); map surface title "Your map"; workshop spaced-rep chip wording not yet decided.
- Map ghost-node hint behavior is click-toggle banner — KICKOFF leaves tooltip vs popover vs inline open.
- Map node positions hand-placed once in MapView GHOST_POSITIONS — not concept-aware. For multi-concept future, registry would need position hints.
- Workshop viz is static — Build Step 5 polish adds Motion animation, per-track outcome pickers, presets, aggregate timeline visual states (resolved-at-time vs rejected-at-time vs pulsing-for-hang).
- Workshop chat composer integration not yet built — currently no /api/workshop-chat endpoint and no chat composer inside the workshop view.
- /api/ghost-nodes endpoint not built — using registry fallback only.
- Wrapper-path post-click UX still ambiguous: button collapse vs disable (currently the AffordanceButtons swaps to a Chose pill, but the original buttons disappear entirely — might want to keep visible+disabled).
- Two lockfiles present (pnpm-lock.yaml active, package-lock.json stale from March 2026) — delete package-lock.json to avoid drift.
- Stale IDE TS-server diagnostics about lucide-react and next/navigation modules — build resolves fine, but VS Code/Cursor reports false positives.
- Build Step 6 (map polish — halo, ghost placement, dim outer-ring atmosphere refinement, hint-on-click polish), Step 7 (chrome details — back-to-map, title, spaced-rep chip with stubbed destination, overflow menu Your notes + Remove), Step 8 (accessibility — keyboard nav for prediction options arrow+Enter, focus mgmt, ARIA roles, ghost-vs-central distinction beyond color alone, accessible alternative for workshop viz state), Step 9 (ship prep — Vercel preview deploy, smoke-test eval path, record ≤8 min walkthrough, design rationale doc draft).
- Inline card framing line currently has the card render inside an assistant message via <reflection-card/> tag; might want to lift it out of the chat message to feel less like UI nested in prose. KICKOFF requires "reads like a notecard, not a UI element."
- Aggregate Promise.all timeline visual states for the three end-states (resolved-at-time, rejected-at-time, pulsing-for-hang) not yet decided — currently only show resolved + hanging.
- Silent vs visible fallback on API failure: lean silent in prod, dev-mode indicator only — not yet wired.
- Future-direction stubs to add inline: workshop caching slot in registry (done, but unused), no-op signal(beatId, kind, value) call sites at signal-capture points (not yet added).
- Walkthrough video + design rationale doc not yet started.
